articles.title: Parents, educators warn NYC students could be at risk under new AI school guidelines
articles.description: Parents, teachers and advocates are pushing back hard against NYC Public Schools' new AI guidelines, warning the city is embracing unproven technology at the expense of students' cognitive development.
articles.content:
The city’s embrace of artificial intelligence in public schools could irreparably harm students, dumbing them down and leaving them dependent on the tech, critics warned.

articles.title: Forget Paying iPhone Prices, the Google Pixel 10a Does Everything for Half the Cost
articles.description: The Google Pixel 10a just launched and Amazon is already selling it below Google's official price. Seven years of software updates, Gemini AI on-device, a 30-hour battery, and a camera that rivals phones twice the price for roughly half what an iPhone costs.
articles.content: The iPhone 16 starts at $799. The iPhone 16 Pro starts at $999. The Pixel 10a does the same core things, great camera, fast processor, AI assistant, crash detection, long battery life, and Amazon currently has it at $449, down from its regular $499, ... [2366 chars]
